DEFAULT.$description: Standard border for general UI elements such as inputs, cards, and panels.

strong.$description: High-emphasis border for focused or active states, such as input focus rings.

muted.$description: Subtle border for low-emphasis separators, dividers, and non-interactive boundaries.

primary.$description: Border for selected, focused, or primary interactive elements to communicate brand intent.

announcement.$description: Border for announcement or promotional UI elements such as banners and callouts.

info.$description: Border for informational states, such as info alerts, messages, or status indicators.

danger.$description: Border for error and destructive states, such as invalid inputs or dangerous actions.

warning.$description: Border for caution states, such as warnings or actions requiring user attention.

success.$description: Border for positive states, such as validated inputs or success confirmation.

neutral.$description: Neutral-connotation border for elements that need role-based intent without specific emphasis.
